description_long: This is a large, upscale residential house surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees, featuring a spacious driveway with parking for multiple vehicles. The house has a complex, multi-volume structure with a mix of flat and slightly pitched roof sections, and a prominent rounded bay window on one corner. The rear of the property includes a sizable swimming pool and a patio area, enclosed by a wooden privacy fence. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored materials, with large windows and multiple entry points, including a main entrance with a small portico and steps. The property is well-integrated with its garden, featuring hedges, flower beds, and paved walkways. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, with a focus on comfort, privacy, and outdoor living.
description: A large, elegant house with a rounded bay window, flat and pitched roofs, a spacious driveway, and a backyard pool, surrounded by trees and a privacy fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with two parked cars, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded bay window, dense tree coverage, and partial view of the backyard pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, and extensive garden space enclosed by a wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway entrance, and a clear view of the pool and garden layout.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of traditional and modern elements)
attribute_roof_type: flat with partial hip and bay roof
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large bay windows and mixed window sizes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small portico, steps, double doors, and flanking columns
